scripts.install:all: npm --prefix weather-app install && npm --prefix forecast-list-app install && npm --prefix weather-detail-app install
scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm --prefix weather-app start" "npm --prefix forecast-list-app start" "npm --prefix weather-detail-app start"
scripts.build:all: concurrently "npm --prefix weather-app run build" "npm --prefix forecast-list-app run build" "npm --prefix weather-detail-app run build"
